{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01V5qM8gLvQwecpK5DkMkX33","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Now I see that the style crate is actually `stylo` - which is from `https://github.com/servo/stylo`.
